utility_outage.title: Power Outages Hit Over 842,000 Homes As Heatwave Disrupts July 4 Events

transit.header: Outbound Green Line C trains (toward Cleveland Circle) will not stop at Tappan Street through Friday, July 10, due to infrastructure upgrades. Riders can board or exit one stop away, at either Washington Square or Dean Road.
transit.description:
Affected direction: westbound

Affected stations:
Tappan Street

transit.header: Outbound Green Line C Branch trains (toward Cleveland Circle) will not stop at Englewood Avenue through Friday, July 10. Riders can board one stop away at Dean Road and exit at either Dean Road or Cleveland Circle.
transit.description:
Affected direction: westbound

Affected stations:
Englewood Avenue
